modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help enhancing pictures in Word documents.

full_description_text: So, I was trying to make some images in my Word doc look better, you know, like adding some brightness or contrast. But I can't figure out how to enhance them properly. I thought there'd be an easy way to do it, but I'm just stuck. Any tips on how to make my pictures pop?
short_description: Need help enhancing pictures in Word documents.
description: So, I was trying to make some images in my Word doc look better, you know, like adding some brightness or contrast. But I can't figure out how to enhance them properly. I thought there'd be an easy way to do it, but I'm just stuck. Any tips on how to make my pictures pop?
